features: FIZZY PICK & MIX SWEETS: Treat your taste buds to our tantalisingly tangy Bebeto Big Fizzy Mix, delicious fizzy gummy sweets packed with our signature fruity flavours

HALAL: Bebeto Big Fizzy Mix gummy sweets taste great and are 100% halal certified; They are manufacturered in a halal certified factory and contain only beef gelatine that has been slaughtered strictly according to Islamic law
100% NATURAL COLOURS: Our Bebeto Big Fizzy Mix are made with no artificial colours and contain fruit juice

SWEET TREAT: Bebeto Fizzy Watermelons gummy sweets make for an excellent sweet treat for all occasions including birthdays, picnics, festivals, movie nights and cinema trips; Take them with you on your next adverture and share with your friends and family if you're feeling generous
GIFT: This bulk buy of Bebeto Big Fizzy Mix fruity sweets make the perfect gift for sweet lovers for any occasion
description: Product Description At Bebeto We strive to provide only products that will exceed your expectations and will always satisfy you to the most. Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Corn Starch, Beef Gelatine, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Apple Juice Concentrate (0.85%), Acids (Tartaric Acid, Malic Acid), Flavourings, Colours (Plain Caramel, Paprica Extract, Lutein, Copper Complexes of Chlorophylls and Chlorophyllins), Fruit and Vegetable Juice Concentrates (Apple, Radish, Blackcurrant, Black Carrot, Hibiscus), None of our products contain Lard and its Derivatives Directions Serve 25 grams per portion Manufacturer Contact Information Kervan Gida UK Ltd, Office 3, First Floor, Lakeside House, Quarry Lane, Chichester, PO19 8NY See more
